name: spider-electron
description: A simple web spider built with Electron
author: andxbes <andxbes@gmail.com>

scripts.start: npm run build:css && CI=true electron-forge start
scripts.make:linux: npm run prebuild && CI=true electron-forge make --platform=linux
scripts.make:win: npm run prebuild && CI=true electron-forge make --platform=win32
scripts.make:mac: npm run prebuild && CI=true electron-forge make --platform=darwin
scripts.make:all: npm run prebuild && CI=true electron-forge make --platform=linux && CI=true electron-forge make --platform=win32 && CI=true electron-forge make --platform=darwin
